subcodes.first_line: The gates of bounty, which from time immemorial had remained sealed, have now been opened by the fingers of Glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ابواب افضالیکه از اول لا اول الی حین مسدود بود اذا قد فتح بالحق باصبع عز
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @development of capacity and readiness, @pride; vanity; laying claim to inner knowledge, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @love of God, @presence of; reunion with God
